Video.summary: Kaye Ballard & Steve Lawrence star. Featuring the movie spoof "Operation Minestrone" & "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Kaye Ballard, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Harvey Korman guests. Features a number about glory & crisis of mid-life. On "Carol & Sis", Carol goes gaga.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Neil Sedaka joins the gang for a set of commercial parodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin dazzles with his famous impressions, then joins up with Lana Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Pat Carroll and Jack Jones guest. Pat and Carol play competing actresses. Plus: "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Jack Jones

Video.summary: Tim Conway's engagement ring for Carol, made from the cursed Hope Diamond, causes no end of bad luck.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shani Wallis, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Kenneth Mars & John Byner star! Includes Carol as a soap opera fanatic, Kenneth's coaching, and dreams.
Video.title: Kenneth Mars, John Byner

Video.summary: Tim & Harvey are generals at the signing of a peace treaty, while "The Family" gathers for Mae's funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Kaye Stevens and Audrey Meadows guest star, featuring "As The Stomach Turns" and the "10th Avenue Family."
Video.title: Kaye Stevens, Audrey Meadows

Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests in the WWII spoof "Mrs. Magnificent." On "Carol & Sis", Roger gets dragged into a PTA show.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Broadway legend Gwen Verdon and Pat Boone join for an installment of "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Gwen Verdon, Pat Boone

Video.summary: Tim has to write a eulogy for his best friend. On "As The Stomach Turns", things turn bionic after a funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Valerie Harper & Tim Conway guest! Valerie joins Carol on a date, and Tim is the world's oldest fireman.
Video.title: Valerie Harper, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Comedian Scoey Mitchell and singer Bobbie Gentry are Carol's guests for "The Queen Elizabeth Show."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Scoey Mitchell, Bobbie Gentry

Video.summary: Among this evening's sketches: "Th Wonderful World Of Prisons", and Carol as "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara Eden, Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays the director of a play put on by the P.T.A., and a hitman hired to kill Carol's husband.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Carol's guests are Mickey Rooney and John Davidson!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Lily Tomlin & Steve Lawrence star! Lily plays a prison matron while Steve plays a crime boss on his honeymoon.
Video.title: Lily Tomlin, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry performs "Mack The Knife", then joins Carol, Harvey, and Trini Lopez in a musical melodrama.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Trini Lopez

Video.summary: Guest Gloria Swanson arrives for the Q&A...but she only has eyes for Lyle.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Gloria Swanson

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as the teacher of Eunice and Bubba in "The Family." Also: a remodeled kitchen falls apart.
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Bob Newhart appears in "Carol & Sis" as Roger's accountant. Also: a hungover Harvey gets a bigger headache.
Video.title: Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Poetically-named guest stars Martha Raye and Tim Conway come to play.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Sketches include Carol as an old lady feeding birds, Tim as a wacky pharmacist, and Carol & Vicki on a cruise.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Mel Torme guest. Coca and Carol are wives of rivals, and Torme is Igor in a Dracula sketch.
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as Tim's girlfriend in a sketch where he is honored with a ship. And, a spoof of "Jaws."
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Helen Reddy & John Byner appear in parodies. John is in a "Nora Desmond" sketch, and Vicki plays columnist.
Video.title: Helen Reddy, John Byner

Video.summary: Jerry Lewis guests as an awkward groom set up for a society marriage. Also: another day with "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Jerry Lewis

Video.summary: Ross Martin and John Davidson guest! John shows off his pipes, and Harvey is interrupted by an extortionist.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: Paul Lynde guests as a real estate man. Also: The 10th Avenue Family & a performance from Carol's Charwoman.
Video.title: Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Tim Conway returns! Tim plays a lion, then teams with Harvey as a pair of military aircraft spotters.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Steve Martin & Betty White catch a wave in the spoof "Beach Blanket Boo-Boo!". Also: Carol plays a bag lady.
Video.title: Steve Martin, Betty White

Video.summary: Burt Reynolds and Nanette Fabray guest. Featuring commercial parodies and the movie "The Lavender Pimpernel."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Mickey Rooney star in a meeting between First Ladies, an audition, and the spoof "Kids Town."
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars with Carol as Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy." Dick Cavett crashes Q&A .
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry takes part in a series of sketches highlighted by his role as a lawyer facing off with Tim.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: When Mama and The Family play Charades, things turn to chaos. Also: a despondent bar patron meets her match.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Buddy Ebsen & Wayne Rogers star! Includes: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Buddy Ebsen, Wayne Rogers
